title: Harry Nelson
text: Home * People * Harry Nelson Harry Nelson [1] Harry Lewis Nelson , an American mathematician and researcher at the Lawrence Livermore National Laboratory . Harry was the Cray Assembly Language (CAL) expert and along with Robert Hyatt and Albert Gower co-author of Cray Blitz , the two-time winner of the World Computer Chess Championship . Along with David Slowinski , Harry Nelson discovered the 27th Mersenne prime in 1979 [2] [3] .
